title: thlaspi fendleri var. glaucum
intro: Thlaspi fendleri var. glaucum, also known as Fendler's penny cress, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Brassicaceae family. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve gastrointestinal issues due to its high content of mustard oils. The health benefits of Fendler's penny cress include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in traditional medicine in the form of capsules or dried extracts.
